questions.text: A particle moves in a straight line with velocity $v = t^2 - 4t + 3$ m/s. Find the time $t$ when the particle comes to rest.
Which of the following functions are continuous at $x = 0$? (Select all that apply)

Calculate the magnitude of the magnetic field at the center of a circular loop of radius $R = 10\text{ cm}$ carrying a current $I = 5\text{ A}$. Take $\mu_0 = 4\pi \times 10^{-7}\text{ T \cdot m/A}$. Write your answer in $\mu\text{T}$.
